description: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.
commit_message:
Stabilize flaky VirtualizationTest AnchorMode tests (#66893)

The `AnchorMode_*_PrependAtTop_ViewportStaysStable` family (and the related
Append/ExpandItem variants) calls `AssertViewportStaysStable` immediately after
clicking the prepend/append button and waiting for the status text. The status
text is set inside the component as soon as the mutation completes, but the
Virtualize render pipeline (anchor restore, IntersectionObserver callbacks,
spacer recomputation) may still be in flight at tha
